TOURNAMENT_PRESETS.shape: Array<{ id:string, display_name:string, description:string, starting_stack_chips:int, level_duration_minutes:int, action_clock_seconds:int, break_after_levels:int, break_duration_minutes:int, levels:Array<{level:int, small_blind:int, big_blind:int, big_blind_ante:int}> }>
TOURNAMENT_PRESETS.notes: Source of truth for preset numeric values. section-4 Cloud Functions (advanceBlindLevel) reads the active tournament's config.levels to know when to advance; section-4 also imports TOURNAMENT_PRESETS for any seeding or admin-recompute paths that re-derive a preset's structure from id.

tournamentConfigDocument.writer: section-3 client; section-4 Cloud Functions read-only on the live path
tournamentConfigDocument.notes: The TournamentConfig shape is shared across section-2/3/4 — this is the canonical persisted form.

notes: section-4's advanceBlindLevel Cloud Function reads /tournaments/{tid}.config.levels[current_level - 1] to compute the active blinds; reads .level_duration_minutes for the next-advancement schedule.
